title: Fluffy Mediterranean Chickpea Stir-fry
description: An earthy and fluffy Mediterranean dish featuring green salsa as a raw-friendly topping for this meal-prep chickpea stir-fry.

ingredients.name: 2 cups canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed

instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add chickpeas and cook until lightly golden.
Add onion and garlic; sauté for about 2 minutes.
Add bell peppers and zucchini, season with salt and pepper. Cook until vegetables are tender-crisp, about 7-10 minutes.
Stir in parsley and lemon juice. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Squeeze a bit of lemon on top before serving as a fresh green salsa to keep the dish raw-friendly.
